title: rosa × vetteri var. latens
intro: Rosa × vetteri var. latens is a variant of the Rosa × vetteri plant, specifically known for its medicinal and therapeutic properties. It is a type of rose species that belongs to the family Rosaceae and is native to certain regions. The medicinal properties of Rosa × vetteri var. latens include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from digestive issues; herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
